name: ᛈ Perthro
summary: Fate, lot-cup, hidden pattern, womb of mystery
flowText: Perthro is the cup you upend when the question is ready. It keeps the pattern hidden until the moment of reveal, then lets the lots tumble into meaning. Trust the dark womb of becoming; what seems like chance is the memory of the deep weaving itself through time. # 9. Alchemical Processes

kabbalah: Gimel (inner lunar passage) veiled within Kaph (turn of fortune)
